Class ControllerModeratorToolTest

java.lang.Object
guiModeratorTool.ControllerModeratorToolTest
class ControllerModeratorToolTest extends Object

Title: guiModeratorTool Class.

Description: This class is used to test the access of different roles and invalid input for the Moderator Tool. Note for each test; I ran into an issue where JavaFX components would crash. To resolve this, I used CountDownLatch to sync up the JUnit thread with the JavaFX thread. This prevents the 'Toolkit not initialized' errors and makes sure the isDisplayed flag is actually updated before the test checks it. The try-finally block is there to make sure the test doesn't hang forever if the GUI code fails.

Copyright: Devin Miller @ 2026

Version:
1.00 2026-04-06 Initial version
Author:
Devin Miller

      public ControllerModeratorToolTest()

  • Method Details

    • testStaffModeratorAccess

      @Test void testStaffModeratorAccess() throws Exception

      Method: testStaffModeratorAccess()

      Description: Verifies that the Moderator Tool is correctly triggered for users with Staff access.

      Throws:
      Exception - if the JavaFX thread is interrupted during latch.

    • testAdminModeratorAccess

      @Test void testAdminModeratorAccess() throws Exception

      Method: testAdminModeratorAccess()

      Description: Verifies that the Moderator Tool is correctly triggered for users with Admin access.

      Throws:
      Exception - if the JavaFX thread is interrupted during latch.

    • testStudentModeratorAccess

      @Test void testStudentModeratorAccess() throws Exception

      Method: testStudentModeratorAccess()

      Description: Verifies that the Moderator Tool is not triggered for users with Student access.

      Throws:
      Exception - if the JavaFX thread is interrupted during latch.

    • testBlankRole

      @Test void testBlankRole() throws Exception

      Method: testBlankRole()

      Description: Verifies that the Moderator Tool is not triggered for users with a blank role.

      Throws:
      Exception - if the JavaFX thread is interrupted during latch.

    • testSysAdminRole

      @Test void testSysAdminRole() throws Exception

      Method: testSysAdminRole()

      Description: Verifies that the Moderator Tool is not triggered for users with SysAdmin role. Note: This is to test strict role checking, so only exact roles are given access.

      Throws:
      Exception - if the JavaFX thread is interrupted during latch.
